artifacts.title: Babel Surface Syntax (BSS) v0.6.0
artifacts.resolves_audit_gap: BSS grammar determinism and forbidden-construct enumeration

artifacts.title: Babel Agent Implementation Contract (AIC) v0.6.0
artifacts.resolves_audit_gap: AIC CLI purity, deterministic exit codes, babel-hash canonicalization

artifacts.title: Babel HIG Amendment v0.6.0
artifacts.resolves_audit_gap: HIG .babel ingestion, ext.kimi.source_ext placement, crash recovery

execution_sequence: 1. Author and commit BSS, AIC, HIG v0.6.0 specs plus this manifest (canonical_sha256 placeholders to be filled by pre-commit hook).
2. Implement bss_to_json canonicalizer in Python 3.11+ as the reference implementation.
3. Implement three AIC CLI tools (babel-emit, babel-validate, babel-hash) wrapping the canonicalizer with the constant-time requirements specified in AIC section 7.
4. Integrate babel-emit into the HIG gateway with the startup recovery scan specified in HIG v0.6.0 section 5.
5. Run cross-platform determinism test on Linux, macOS, and Windows, verifying byte-identical babel-emit output against the DTH golden matrix.
6. Emit M0-v0.6.0 milestone draft with criteria_sha256=<integration-test-hash> and ext.kimi.milestone.status=complete.

deepseek_v0.6.0_blocking_issues.issue: meta.source_ext may violate v0.1.0 closed schema
deepseek_v0.6.0_blocking_issues.resolution: Moved to ext.kimi.source_ext per v0.4.0 convention; documented in HIG v0.6.0 section 3
babel-hash now explicitly canonicalizes BSS to v0.2.0 JSON before SHA-256; documented in AIC v0.6.0 section 5

deepseek_v0.6.0_blocking_issues.issue: HIG .babel ingestion lacks crash recovery for .processing/ orphans
deepseek_v0.6.0_blocking_issues.resolution: Startup recovery scan specified in HIG v0.6.0 section 5: retry or move-to-invalid with .error.json
